stemHtml: A hand fire extinguisher needs to be used in the cabin. What should the crew member do, prior to using the fire extinguisher, in order to most effectively reduce the risk of inhaling toxic fumes or smoke?

options.a: Place a dry towel around their mouth and nose.
options.b: Use a portable oxygen bottle with a mouth-mask.
options.c: Place their hand over their mouth and nose.
options.d: Put on portable Protective Breathing Equipment.
